zotero.abstractNote: Deep ensembles are a gold standard for uncertainty estimation and out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness. However, their computational cost scales linearly with the number of ensemble members, limiting their use in large-scale applications. We propose Diverse Universe, a scalable framework for ensemble diversification that encourages diversity in the feature space without requiring explicit ensemble training. By leveraging a lightweight, non-parametric approach, we can diversify existing pre-trained models or train ensembles with minimal overhead. We demonstrate that Diverse Universe achieves state-of-the-art performance on OOD generalization and detection benchmarks, while being significantly more efficient than traditional ensemble methods.
